role_title: Security Product Lead – Threat Intelligence & Insider Risk
secondary_archetype: Security Product Lead / Security Strategy PM

level_signals: 7+ years of experience in cybersecurity, risk management, or technology strategy roles
Influence without direct authority at cross-functional level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of experience in cybersecurity, risk management, or technology strategy roles.
Experience in Threat Intelligence, Insider Risk, SOC, or related security domains.
Demonstrated experience building and managing strategic roadmaps tied to measurable outcomes.
Strong understanding of adversary tactics (e.g., MITRE ATT&CK), intelligence lifecycle, and insider risk considerations.
Strong product mindset with ability to translate strategy into execution
Experience working in matrixed organizations with cross-functional stakeholders.
Strong analytical, communication, and executive presentation skills.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or related discipline.

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska

scope.surface: Threat Intelligence & Insider Risk capabilities within the Security Strategy & Delivery team
scope.business_model: B2C fintech / national bank — internal security product function
cross_functional_partners: Threat Intelligence & Insider Risk functional leader
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain a multi-year strategy and roadmap for Threat Intelligence and Insider Risk capabilities.
Align roadmap priorities with enterprise risk objectives, regulatory requirements, and evolving threat landscape.
Define the value proposition and service model for Threat Intelligence & Insider Risk capabilities.
Maintain and prioritize a strategic backlog aligned to measurable risk reduction outcomes.
Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure effectiveness, including intelligence relevance, dissemination timeliness, detection coverage, and insider risk metrics.
Provide executive-level reporting on capability performance, maturity progress, and risk impact.
Own the portfolio view of Threat Intelligence & Insider Risk initiatives within the broader security strategy.
Manage cross-functional dependencies across Security, Engineering, HR, Legal, and other stakeholders.
Monitor industry trends, adversary tactics, and insider risk developments.
Identify opportunities for automation, analytics enhancement, and process optimization.

green_flags: Clear ownership scope — defined product surface (Threat Intelligence & Insider Risk) with explicit KPI responsibility
Role is positioned at strategic/senior level with executive visibility
Structured governance and cross-functional collaboration model described in detail
SoFi is a national bank-licensed fintech with significant scale and security investment
red_flags: Compensation range is referenced but not actually published in the JD text — no base pay figures provided
Work location type is not stated — remote eligibility, hybrid requirements, and visa sponsorship are all ambiguous
No nice-to-haves listed, making the full picture of preferred differentiation unclear
Role straddles PM, TPM, and security strategy functions — title and scope may not align with traditional PM or TPM career paths
